scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run aot && node ./node_modules/@mpeliz/gtplweb/tools/app-build.js --mode dev
scripts.build:bundle: npm run clean && npm run aot && node ./node_modules/@mpeliz/gtplweb/tools/app-build.js --mode bundle
scripts.build:bundle-split: npm run clean && npm run aot && node ./node_modules/@mpeliz/gtplweb/tools/app-build.js --mode bundle-split
